docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-25-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NEWLY MARKED EVIDENCE IS RETAINED / BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS / NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARINA CLEANERS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,250.00 FILED BY ANJEDANI, LEYLA AS TO DEFENDANT MARINA CLEANERS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANJEDANI, LEYLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARINA CLEANERS, INC. $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.00, DEFENDANT IS TO KEEP AS HIS OWN PROPERTY THE SUBJECT HAND BAG WHICH PLAINTIFF REJECTED AS BEING DEFECTIVELY CLEANED. DEFENDANT'S NAME IS AMENDED TO MARINA CLEANERS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
